name: World Legacy's Sorrow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>に<ruby lang="jp"><rb>響</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひび</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>く<ruby lang="jp"><rb>残</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>叫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Yelling Echo Resounding in the Star Relic
desc: When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, while you control a co-linked monster(s): Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only activate 1 "World Legacy's Sorrow" per turn.
eff: When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, while you control a co-linked monster(s): Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only activate 1 "World Legacy's Sorrow" per turn.

mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
